/usr/bin/ar qc liblibapp.a CMakeFiles/libapp.dir/src/glad/src/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/libapp.dir/src/lib/UI/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libapp.dir/src/lib/UI/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libapp.dir/src/lib/UI/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libapp.dir/src/lib/UI/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libapp.dir/src/lib/UI/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libapp.dir/src/lib/UI/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libapp.dir/src/lib/UI/ui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libapp.dir/src/lib/audio/audio.c.o CMakeFiles/libapp.dir/src/lib/render/camera/camera.c.o CMakeFiles/libapp.dir/src/lib/render/render.c.o CMakeFiles/libapp.dir/src/lib/win/window.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liblibapp.a
